title: AutoMind Runtime State
description: Mutable runtime/resume projection for one AutoMind task. Macro phase routing lives in stateSummary.

status.description: Current runtime status such as created, planning, generating, evaluating, human_input_pending, failed, or finished.

currentOwner.description: Current owner responsible for the next runtime step, e.g. planner, generator, evaluator, automind, or user.

nextAction.description: Runtime/resume next action such as run_generator, run_evaluator, retry, replan, ask_user, stop_blocked, or finish.

planner.description: Planner-local state, including preImplementationReview when present.

evaluatorContext.description: Evaluator context-pack pointers and isolation metadata when model evaluation is used.

resumeRecovery.description: Stage-level recovery decision derived from runtime/evaluation/log artifacts.

latestUserAnswer.description: Most recent structured user answer captured by ask_user/message flows.

latestUserMessage.description: Most recent free-form user message captured by message flows.

workflowCheck.description: Latest workflow-check result summary, if recorded.

completionCheck.description: Latest completion-check result cached for resume/reporting.

completionVerdict.description: Latest completion verdict cached for terminal-state guarding.

decisionLog.description: Bounded recent decision log entries for compressed-session continuity.

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in local ISO format.

stateSummary.description: Primary and only live-state summary. Prefer this over raw workflow/evaluation/runtime fields when explaining current/next macro state.
